title: Add a rate-limiter module to the agent runtime
prompt: Add a rate_limiter.py module to src/agent_runtime/ that enforces a configurable per-task-class request rate limit using a token-bucket algorithm. Include unit tests with 100% coverage and update the module table in docs/architecture.md.

rubric.notes: Greenfield feature. Spec must be created before any code is written. High-risk: new module in the runtime core.
